summary: Suggested service packages for SMEs and technical teams.

offers.name: CASULO Operational Diagnosis
offers.purpose: Map current state, evidence gaps, risks and first gates.

offers.name: Cubo PME Starter
offers.purpose: Install a first operational cube for one recurring process.

offers.name: TIC/SI State Mesh
offers.purpose: Map applications, integrations, incidents, access, changes and gates.

offers.name: Software Review Gate
offers.purpose: Review existing software and produce a controlled improvement plan.

offers.name: Solution Factory Sprint
offers.purpose: Transform approved deltas into governed software tasks, tests and delivery evidence.

offers.name: AI Program Operating Layer
offers.purpose: Structure AI adoption around state, evidence, governance, value deltas and safe execution.

roadmap: PROD-071..080 Software Review and Codex Development Gate
PROD-081..090 PME AI Program / Client Demo Pack
